title: Patelai 50 Pcs Mini Glass Bottles Jars with Cork Stoppers Tiny Cork Glass Bottles Small Wishing Bottles Message Bottle DIY Decor for Winter Christmas Party Wedding Baby Shower Favors(Geometric Shape)
description:
About this item
Durable material: the tiny jars are made of high borosilicate glass with high transparency and smooth surface; Glass is thick, not fragile; If you use these glass bottles to do some DIY decorations, you don't need to be afraid of breaking unless dropping them from high places
Usage: can fill some pretty beads or put notes with great wishes, store seeds, be a perfume bottle; These mini glass bottles can be applied to decorate homes, hostels, bars, party, cafes, restaurants etc.; You can show your creativity and imagination about how to use them
Details: the mini glass bottles capacity is about 2 ml; Different sizes with different shapes; Bulb-shaped is 0.98 x 0.55 inch /2.5 x 1.4 cm, drops-shaped is 1.22 x 0.51 inch /3.1x 1.3 cm, heart-shaped is 1.02 x 0.91 inch/ 2.6 x 2.3 cm, cylindrical-shaped is1.69 x 0.39 inch/ 4.3 x 1 cm, flat bottom spherical-shaped is 0.91 x 0.59 inch/ 2.3 x 1.5 cm; They are really tinny bottles by handmade, please check the size carefully before you buy them
Package includes: 50 pieces of mini glass bottles with cork stoppers in 5 shapes, each shape contains 10 pieces, the quantity and varied shapes can meet your multiple needs; Please note that due to fragile goods, there may be individual broken in the process of transportation, even though we have taken protective measures
As gift: you can put the thing you like into the tiny cork bottles and send them as presents to friends or families, or just send the empty bottles as gifts; Filling dried flowers and tying a string to a bottle as a necklace is also a surprise gift choice
reviews_5s:
I took these and filled them with different chunky glitters and put them into my little terrariums with my crystal mushies. Each looks like a little bottle of magic dust and adds such a vibe to each piece. Some of the little corks do not sit tight though so I glued mine shut. 10/10 recommend. I’ll fill the remaining ones with glitter and randomly give hand them out.We used this for fake looking potion bottles, they are very tiny but they are super sturdy plus with the cork they come with, they didn’t leak! It was perfect! We used them as part of the center pieces.These bottles are TINY! Read the entire product description. I’ve added photos in my hand for scale.
At first I thought that there no corks. I grumped at my husband and he looked in the box and agreed. Then I took a second, closer look before throwing away the box and there was the bag of corks, firmly stuck to the bottom. Check your box thoroughly; the bag is white and was flat to the bottom. (Camouflaged.) Two of mine arrived broken.
Overall, a decent product for the price and also just what I expected when I purchased it. They’ll work well to hold sand, salt, glitter, dust, or liquid.This was a good size, very small, to put a mustard seed. The Bible teaches about the faith the size of a mustard seed. We used it as a gift for all of the men at a prayer breakfast and all the women at a brunch!!These are great, especially fit the place. I old recommended.

I used them to make dnd health potions and they’re adorable.I use as for props and treasure in DnD the small size is perfect for minis.I bought 2 of these bottles in a shop and they were selling them for $3 a piece! I looked on Amazon and ordered this product. 50 for $12. What a steal!I use these to make earrings and they work perfectly! Took some time to figure out what glue works best but I love the miniature sizing and they are lightweight enough for earsThere's so many I don't know what to actually do with all of them, but they're super cute and easy to fill up with whatever little things you wanna put in them.Items arrives well packaged and in good condition. Items are as I expected, if you still have doubts, check the photos in my review. 100% satisfied customers.
reviews_1s: Definitely what I wanted but smaller than I thought and then majority of them are broken 😞Absolute trash. They’re uneven, poorly made pieces of garbage. I threw them out.The bottles arrive with no cork stoppers, very disappointedHalf of them arrived broken…These look so cute and I was going to used them this year for my holiday part however, they never came.Too smallMost likely it's my fault because I didn't check the size, but these are too tiny. They are so small that impossible to pour something inside. We returned themSo tiny you could loose them in a sand box. I had 3 of them have a hole in them already. Kids are disappointed in these. Will not be buying again.These would be perfect for my project, but they are completely useless to me now, without corks on any of themThey are ITTY BITTY and yes I should have checked the reviews not realizing it looks way bigger in picture but I’m also missing 30 of them?! Like I got 20 of 50?!
